title: armeria pseudarmeria subsp. littoralis
intro: Armeria pseudarmeria subsp. littoralis, also known as sea thrift, is a coastal plant species belonging to the Primulaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of sea thrift include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Sea thrift can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
